.canvas-card-menu.background: rgb(17, 17, 17) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.file-embed.background: rgb(19, 19, 19) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.status-bar.background: rgb(17, 17, 17) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.view-content.background: rgb(17, 17, 17) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

body.--blur-background: color-mix(in srgb, #272727 65%, transparent) linear-gradient(#272727, color-mix(in srgb, #272727 65%, transparent))
body.--raised-background: color-mix(in srgb, #272727 65%, transparent) linear-gradient(#272727, color-mix(in srgb, #272727 65%, transparent))
body.background: rgb(17, 17, 17) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

body.styled-scrollbars.background: rgb(17, 17, 17) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.mod-active.workspace-leaf.background: rgb(17, 17, 17) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.mod-horizontal.mod-left-split.mod-si.background: rgb(17, 17, 17) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.mod-horizontal.mod-right-split.mod-s.background: rgb(17, 17, 17) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.prompt.background: rgb(17, 17, 17) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.workspace-leaf.background: rgb(17, 17, 17) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

input[type=\"checkbox\"]:checked::after.background: rgb(17, 17, 17) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

input[type=\"search\"].background: rgb(23, 23, 23) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

kbd.background: rgb(19, 19, 19) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

pre.background: rgb(19, 19, 19) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

pre.language-js.background: rgb(19, 19, 19) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box
